hero.title: Empowering CSE & SWE Students
hero.subtitle: CampusFlow is a dedicated toolkit built by BornoSoft for students. Our mission is to simplify academic workflows at Daffodil International University and beyond.

automation.title: Precision Automation
automation.desc: Stop wasting time manually typing course details. CampusFlow automates your cover pages with accuracy based on official university standards.

security.title: Data Integrity
security.desc: Your academic records are safe. We use secure cloud infrastructure to ensure your profile data is available whenever you need it.

founder.title: Built by Mohammad Ali Nayeem
founder.desc: As a fellow student, I know the struggle of formatting reports. CampusFlow was born to help our community thrive through technology and better design.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or partnership — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.stayWithUs: Stay with BornoSoft — we're building CampusFlow for you.
